text:
EXPLANATION: The cited paper exists but was referenced with a slightly modified title and missing an author; the correct title is "MACE-OFF: Transferable Short Range Machine Learning Force Fields for Organic Molecules" and includes Yixuan Pu as an author. This is a minor metadata mismatch rather than a fabrication.

LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2312.15211
FOUND_TITLE: MACE-OFF: Transferable Short Range Machine Learning Force Fields for Organic Molecules
FOUND_AUTHORS: Dávid Péter Kovács, J. Harry Moore, Nicholas J. Browning, Ilyes Batatia, Joshua T. Horton, Yixuan Pu, Venkat Kapil, William C. Witt, Ioan-Bogdan Magdău, Daniel J. Cole, Gábor Csányi
FOUND_YEAR: 2023
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
